hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */kitz_gateway_ts/*) cd /home/user/kitz/kitz_gateway_ts && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; */renewflo/*) cd /home/user/kitz/renewflo && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; */packages/*|*/services/*) cd /home/user/kitz && pnpm typecheck 2>&1 | tail -20 ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*) cd /home/user/kitz; changed=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$changed" | grep -q '^kitz_gateway_ts/'; then echo '--- Running gateway tests ---'; cd /home/user/kitz/kitz_gateway_ts && npx vitest run 2>&1 | tail -20; fi; if echo "$changed" | grep -q '^renewflo/'; then echo '--- Running RenewFlow tests ---'; cd /home/user/kitz/renewflo && npm test 2>&1 | tail -20; fi ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
